data.title: Transportation Engineering
data.description: Innovative transport solutions connecting people and places through intelligent infrastructure design.
data.content: Our transportation engineering team delivers integrated solutions for roads, highways, railways, airports, and public transit systems. We combine technical excellence with sustainable design principles to create efficient, safe, and future-ready transport networks.
data.expertise: With over 50 years of experience, our transportation team has delivered iconic projects on every continent. We leverage advanced digital tools including traffic microsimulation, BIM, and data analytics to optimize transport network performance. Our engineers work across all project stages from strategic planning through detailed design to construction supervision.

data.title: Water & Environment
data.description: Protecting water resources and creating resilient solutions for a sustainable future.
data.content: We design innovative water infrastructure and environmental solutions that protect natural resources, improve public health, and build resilience to climate change. From water supply and wastewater treatment to flood management and environmental restoration, we deliver sustainable outcomes for communities worldwide.
data.expertise: Our water and environment specialists combine deep technical knowledge with innovative thinking to solve complex water challenges. We use advanced modeling tools and nature-based solutions to design infrastructure that works with natural systems. Climate resilience is embedded in everything we do.

data.title: Buildings & Infrastructure
data.description: Creating exceptional buildings and infrastructure that enhance communities and stand the test of time.
data.content: We deliver comprehensive engineering services for buildings and infrastructure of all types and scales. Our multidisciplinary teams provide structural, MEP, façade, and geotechnical engineering alongside building physics, acoustics, and sustainability consulting to create high-performance, resilient buildings.
data.expertise: From landmark skyscrapers to essential infrastructure, our buildings team brings technical excellence and creative problem-solving to every project. We collaborate closely with architects and clients to realize ambitious visions while ensuring buildings are safe, sustainable, and economically viable. Our engineers are experts in complex structures, advanced materials, and integrated building systems.

data.title: Energy & Power
data.description: Powering the transition to clean, reliable, and affordable energy for all.
data.content: Our energy engineers design power generation, transmission, and distribution infrastructure for conventional and renewable sources. We help clients navigate the energy transition, decarbonize operations, and build resilient power systems that support economic development while protecting the environment.
data.expertise: With decades of experience across all energy sectors, our specialists understand the technical, economic, and environmental challenges of modern energy systems. We design infrastructure that balances reliability, sustainability, and affordability. Our team includes electrical engineers, process engineers, and energy economists who deliver integrated solutions from feasibility through operations.
caseStudies: Hinkley Point C Nuclear Power Station

data.title: Digital Engineering
data.description: Harnessing digital technology to transform infrastructure delivery and asset performance.
data.content: We leverage cutting-edge digital technologies including BIM, digital twins, AI, and data analytics to optimize infrastructure design, construction, and operations. Our digital engineering services help clients make better decisions, reduce costs, improve safety, and enhance asset performance throughout the project lifecycle.
data.expertise: Our digital engineering specialists are at the forefront of infrastructure digitalization. We implement digital workflows that enhance collaboration, improve quality, and accelerate delivery. From parametric design and automated clash detection to predictive maintenance using AI, we help clients harness the full potential of digital technology.

data.title: Sustainability & Climate Resilience
data.description: Building a sustainable future through low-carbon design and climate-resilient infrastructure.
data.content: We help clients achieve their sustainability goals and adapt to climate change through innovative design, strategic consulting, and holistic assessment services. Our specialists integrate environmental, social, and economic considerations into every project to deliver lasting positive outcomes.
data.expertise: Our sustainability team includes environmental scientists, climate specialists, and sustainability engineers who embed low-carbon and climate-resilient thinking into infrastructure projects. We use life cycle assessment, carbon modeling, and climate projections to design infrastructure that minimizes environmental impact and adapts to future climate conditions.
